scope: Add the current MiroFish frontier checkpoint to the repo-local watchtower surface and fix latest-artifact selection for frontier exports

decision_context.prior_state: The local comparison page existed, but the watchtower surface still only had a MiroFish portfolio page and the frontier export resolver could choose the wrong frontier checkpoint by filename sort.
decision_context.decision: Add a dedicated MiroFish frontier watchtower page, keep the local comparison HTML under research/meta, and switch latest-artifact selection to modification time.
decision_context.why_now: The user asked to see which domain chips the agents have chosen right now, so the current frontier checkpoint needs a real downstream dashboard surface instead of only raw artifacts.

files_expected.purpose: Adds the MiroFish frontier watchtower page and fixes latest artifact selection.
Covers the new frontier watchtower page.
Comparative local-host surface for the current frontier checkpoints.
Repo-local watchtower frontier page for the current checkpoint.
Records the refreshed watchtower page set including the frontier page.
Documents the new frontier surface and the latest-artifact resolver fix.

planned_steps: Add a dedicated MiroFish frontier watchtower page
Refresh the repo-local watchtower latest surface so the new page is emitted
Fix latest frontier export selection so the page points at the real newest checkpoint

commands: $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m pytest tests/test_watchtower.py tests/test_mirofish_hybrid.py tests/test_mirofish_discovery.py tests/test_mirofish_portfolio.py tests/test_trend_prediction.py -q
expected_checks: The watchtower page set includes MiroFish Frontier.md
The frontier watchtower page resolves to the deeper 180 export rather than the older deeper 90 export
The repo-local local-host comparison page exists under research/meta

guardrails: Do not remove the existing MiroFish portfolio watchtower page
Keep the comparison HTML and generated watchtower surface inside research/meta
Use artifact modification time instead of filename sort when selecting the latest frontier export
